REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON JUN-20-2013. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 503 ON MAR-17-2014 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL, CONDITIONAL UPON THE DEPOSITION OF MRS. LUCIA RAZO TO CONCLUDE BY 8/31/13. DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR BERRY AND BERRY MAY REQUEST TO ADD THIS CASE TO THE 10/17/13 TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE IF THE CONDITION TO TRIAL BEING SET HAS NOT BEEN MET. THE COURT AND COUNSELS CONFER REGARDING EXPERT WITNESS DEMANDS AND EXPERT WITNESS DEPOSITION NOTICES AS NOTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT. DEMAND FOR EXPERTS SHALL BE SIMULTANEOUS EXCHANGES 50 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL AND ALL THE REPORTS PURSUANT TO CODE. EACH SIDE INFORM THE OTHER 35 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL WHICH EXPERTS THEY ARE GOING TO TAKE THE DEPOSITION OF AND THEN SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITION. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM BY BERRY & BERRY. LIV/LC (BRAYTON). JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: KIM RICHARDSON, CSR#5915 FROM AIKEN WELCH (510)451-1580 FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL BERRY & BERRY. (206)

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, PLAINTIFFS MAXIMILIANO RAZO, LUCIA RAZO'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTION NO. CGC-09-275293 WITH ACTION NO. CGC-11-275937 IS GRANTED. CONSOLIDATION IS PROPER UNDER CCP 1048(A) AS IT WILL ENHANCE THE TRIAL COURT'S ECONOMY AND EFFICIENCY WHILE AVOIDING UNNECESSARY DELAY. HOWEVER, THE CONSOLIDATION WILL NOT AFFECT THE RIGHTS OF THE PARTIES, PARTICULARLY THE DEFENDANTS' RIGHTS TO CONDUCT MEANINGFUL DISCOVERY. HENCEFORTH, ALL PAPERS SHALL BE FILED IN THE LEAD CASE NUMBER: ACTION NO. CGC-09-275293. THE DECEMBER 20, 2012 TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE DATE SET IS MAINTAINED. DISCOVERY REMAINS CLOSED FOR THE PARTIES IN ACTION NO. CGC-09-275293 UNLESS THERE'S A SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE. THE FEBRUARY 6, 2012 TRIAL DATE GIVEN TO ACTION NO. CGC-09-275293 IS VACATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: MARY ANN SCANLAN, CSR # 8875

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Maximiliano Razo and Lucia Razo

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS MAXIMILIANO RAZO, LUCIA RAZO'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order to consolidate Action No. CGC-09-275293 with Action No. CGC-11-275937 is granted. Consolidation is proper under CCP 1048(a) as it will enhance the trial court's economy and efficiency while avoiding unnecessary delay. However, the consolidation will not affect the rights of the parties, particularly the defendants' rights to conduct meaningful discovery. Henceforth, all papers shall be filed in the lead case number: Action No. CGC-09-275293. The December 20, 2012 Trial Setting Conference date set is maintained. Discovery remains closed for the parties in Action No. CGC-09-275293 unless there's a showing of good cause. The February 6, 2012 trial date given to Action No. CGC-09-275293 is vacated. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Mary Ann Scanlan, CSR # 8875 = (503/TLJ)
